distinction.definition: The fundamental ontological act: marking φ from ¬φ

witness.definition: That which observes and verifies a distinction

cut.definition: The positional aspect of distinction: here vs there

K\u2084.definition: The complete graph on 4 vertices; the unique self-consistent structure forced by witness-closure

witness-closure.definition: The requirement that every distinction must be witnessed, forming a closed system

Distinction Field.definition: The unique fundamental field; K₄ is its structure

eigenmode.definition: An eigenvector of the K₄ Laplacian; physically manifests as a fermion generation

Laplacian.definition: The graph Laplacian L = D - A, where D is degree matrix, A is adjacency

fine-structure constant.definition: The electromagnetic coupling; emerges as 1/137 from K₄ spectral structure

emergent.definition: Arising necessarily from K₄ structure without additional input
